'''wabufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zek|zek]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-b-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zek|zek]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wabufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæbifith|wæbifith]] || [[word:wæbifij|wæbifij]] || [[word:wæbifish|wæbifish]] || [[word:wæbifi|wæbifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wabubufuth|wabubufuth]] || [[word:wabubufuj|wabubufuj]] || [[word:wabubufush|wabubufush]] || [[word:wabubufu|wabubufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wabufuth|wabufuth]] || [[word:wabufuj|wabufuj]] || [[word:wabufush|wabufush]] || [[word:wabufu|wabufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wabuffuth|wabuffuth]] || [[word:wabuffuj|wabuffuj]] || [[word:wabuffush|wabuffush]] || [[word:wabuffuf|wabuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wabufuthu|wabufuthu]] || [[word:wabufuju|wabufuju]] || [[word:wabufushu|wabufushu]] || [[word:wabufuku|wabufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wabufuth|wabufuth]] || [[word:wabufuj|wabufuj]] || [[word:wabufush|wabufush]] || [[word:wabufu|wabufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wabufuthul|wabufuthul]] || [[word:wabufujul|wabufujul]] || [[word:wabufushul|wabufushul]] || [[word:wabufukul|wabufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wabufuthuthu|wabufuthuthu]] || [[word:wabufujuju|wabufujuju]] || [[word:wabufushushu|wabufushushu]] || [[word:wabufuku|wabufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wabufuthun|wabufuthun]] || [[word:wabufujun|wabufujun]] || [[word:wabufushun|wabufushun]] || [[word:wabufukun|wabufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wabufuthuoro|wabufuthuoro]] || [[word:wabufujuoro|wabufujuoro]] || [[word:wabufushuoro|wabufushuoro]] || [[word:wabufukuoro|wabufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
